200.description: Calibration result. Always HTTP 200 — inspect status field. status: recommendation_available | no_recommendation

schema.x-ts-note: SDK field mapping: recommended_params → recommendedParams (not recommended.threshold). The TS type must expose cal.recommendedParams, cal.calibrationToken, cal.impact.deltaAlerts — NOT cal.recommended.threshold. This ensures alignment with the generic params_applied pattern used in ApplyCalibrationResult (strategy-agnostic, not threshold-specific).

status.description: no_recommendation is returned when: - No valid adjustment exists within threshold_bounds - Strategy is equals (categorical — no numeric parameter to adjust) - Insufficient feedback history exists

no_recommendation_reason.description: Present when status is no_recommendation. Values: bounds_exceeded | not_applicable_strategy | insufficient_data

calibration_token.description: Present when status is recommendation_available. Pass to POST /conditions/apply-calibration.

recommended_params.description: Present when status is recommendation_available. Key-value pairs matching the strategy's parameter schema. threshold:  { value: float } percentile: { value: float } change:     { value: float } z_score:    { threshold: float } equals:     always null (not applicable)

current_params.description: The current parameter values for comparison

delta_alerts.description: Estimated change in daily alert volume

schema.title: CalibrationResult

type.description: Machine-readable error type. Always branch on this field — never on message. TypeScript SDK maps this directly to MemintelError.type.
Machine-readable error type. Always branch on this field — never on message. TypeScript SDK maps this directly to MemintelError.type.
